nasb.text: “If there is found in your midst, in any of your towns, which the Lord your God is giving you, a man or a woman who does what is evil in the sight of the Lord your God, by transgressing His covenant,

esv.text: “If there is found among you, within any of your towns that the Lord your God is giving you, a man or woman who does what is evil in the sight of the Lord your God, in transgressing his covenant,

cnv.text: “在你中間，就是耶和華你的　神賜給你的任何一座城裡，如果發現有人，無論是男是女，行耶和華你的　神眼中看為惡的事，違犯了他的約，

ccb.text: “如果有人在你们的上帝耶和华将要赐给你们的各城镇做祂视为恶的事，违背祂的约，
